name: Parmesan Baked Potatoes
recipeIngredient: 8 large red potatoes, peeled and halved with the cut side down
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour butter into a 13x9 inch baking pan.
2. Sprinkle cheese evenly over the butter.
3. Place potatoes on top of the cheese, cut side down.
4. Bake, uncovered, at 400°F for 40-45 minutes or until tender.
